Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement And Mutual Release
Off Calendar Aug-11-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Valencia, via ZOOM, for Christine Lucas, Personal Representative; Stephen McDonagh, via ZOOM, for Alice Del Rosario Petitioner.

The court begins by pointing to its tentative ruling that the settlement agreement and proposed order thereon appear to bind the court to issues that the court simply cannot be bound by. The court then advises that it appears that the previous order granted by the court without a hearing should have in fact been a hearing so that the court could hear from the parties regarding the plan for this case. Both Mr. Valencia and Mr. McDonagh provide oral testimony regarding the efforts to come to a settlement agreement and to support the petition for the court's approval of the settlement. The court and counsel then discuss options to resolve this matter if the court does not grant the petition to approve settlement including advising counsel that the court may consider any settlement language included in a Petition for Final Distribution. The court then reminds counsel that this matter is set for Status on Close of Estate on November 16, 2021 and advises counsel to have a Petition filed two weeks prior.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Order Approving Settlement and Mutual Release is off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
